text: Kal raat Sasu-maa se behas hui ki meri working lifestyle ki wajah se nanad ke rishtey thukraye ja rahe hain aur 'log kya kahenge' ki bhabhi hi ghar par nahi tikti. Main aaj office mein baithi hoon par dimaag bilkul sunn hai, bas rona aa raha hai aur presentations ke baare mein sochna namumkin lag raha hai. Itni zyada emotional flooding ho rahi hai ki lag raha hai main har jagah fail ho rahi hoon.

Raat ko pati ke sath bina resolution ke jhagda khatam hua kyunki unhone kaha ki meri career ambition parivaar ki 'izzat' se badi nahi hai, khaas kar jab rishtey baar-baar laut rahe hon. Main itni ghabrahat mein hoon ki subah se laptop khola hai par ek shabd bhi nahi padh paa rahi, bas ek gehra andhera mehsus ho raha hai. Flood of emotions itna tez hai ki samajh nahi aa raha is ghutan se kaise bahar niklu.

Mummy-ji ne kal kaha ki kundali aur caste sab milne ke baad bhi meri 'negative aura' ki wajah se ghar mein rishtey nahi aa rahe. Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas akele mein sisak rahi hoon, na ghar ke kamo ka hosh hai na office ki deadlines ka. Dimaag ekdum blank ho gaya hai, bas lag raha hai ki main hi is parivaar ke liye ek manhoos bojh hoon.

Kal raat ki ladaai mein jab Sasu-maa ne dowry ki baaton ko mere career se joda, toh mera dimaag kaam karna band kar gaya. Subah se bas sunn hokar rasoi mein khadi hoon, samajh nahi aa raha ki sabji kaise banau ya meeting kaise join karun. Itne saare emotions ek saath aa rahe hain ki lag raha hai meri koi identity hi nahi bachi hai.

Raat ki behas ke baad jab pati ne bola ki meri wajah se unka sir 'log kya kahenge' ki wajah se jhuk gaya hai, toh mera gala rone se bhar gaya. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki solution ke baare mein sochna toh door, mujhe bas is waqt rone ke liye ek kona chahiye. Itni koshish ke baad bhi jab sab mujh par hi ungli uthate hain, toh bas lagta hai ki sab khatam ho gaya hai.
